name: proxview
description: Self-hosted, multi-site Proxmox VE + Proxmox Backup Server monitoring dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
